summary:
UNDERGROUND NETWORK AND MOLE: Brandon describes a vision involving a specific building in Chicago and a distraction in another location. He states there is an informant acting as a mole who is leaking information to a central figure described as the boss or the head of the snake. This boss, who is reportedly accompanied by two individuals dressed in black, operates from an underground location that requires a key card for access. Brandon mentions a strategy to feed false information to this mole to create confusion and ultimately expose the operation.

JUSTICE DEPARTMENT AND PAM BONDI: Brandon discusses an ongoing investigation by the Justice Department, specifically naming Pam Bondi. He claims she is close to uncovering a deep, layered network and requires just a little more information to finalize the case against a specific individual, who is associated with the Biden administration. Brandon states that there is an underground hit list with bounties ranging from $50,000 to $500,000 targeting Pam Bondi, cabinet members, and Supreme Court Justices. He notes that the necessary evidence to expose this network is hidden on a computer drive or within the back door of social media software.

POLITICAL FIGURES AND PROTECTIONS: Brandon details specific political figures, starting with Donald Trump, stating that Trump requires protection for his health, marriage, and against opposing forces. He also mentions Alex Jones and Tucker Carlson, claiming both will uncover hidden information and experience personal awakenings, with interventions preventing attempts to silence them. Brandon predicts the political decline of Gavin, who he says is planning a presidential run in 2028, and mentions Booker as being blinded by success. Furthermore, Brandon states the Democratic party is grooming an unidentified woman who will emerge from obscurity, comparing this sudden rise to that of Barack Obama. He also calls for the protection of Rudy Giuliani and Mike Huckabee.

ECONOMIC SHIFTS AND TRAFFICKING: Brandon outlines impending economic events, including a government shutdown, actions by the Federal Reserve, and a significant shaking in the New York real estate market. He predicts a massive wealth transfer as billionaires flee New York for locations like Miami, West Palm Beach, and Texas. Additionally, Brandon discusses underground financial movements facilitated by unregulated cryptocurrency, which he connects to severe illicit activities. He explicitly names networks involved in sex trafficking, fentanyl distribution, human and organ trafficking, and Pizzagate, stating that these operations are funded by deep-pocketed individuals aiming to bring instability and radical jihad to the nation.
rawData: [October 29, 2025]-[The Lord said to pray over Pam Bondi]-[https://youtu.be/U8IAGFgZGEA]-[He said, "Remind them of the one building in Chicago and a great distraction in another." We had them on the run. I see the main guy so clearly again. He's always steps ahead because he's being warned before they get there. There's a rat within; I see it so clearly. There are more rats within, running and trying to hide. I see the people that get there right after it's too late. Father, I want you to focus on this. We want to catch this man. He has an informant. In this informant, the informant is warning this man before the good guys get there because this guy's a rat. We want this man, for he's the head of the snake in this area. If we can get this head, we will get the tail. Do you understand what I'm trying to tell you? I can't say too much, but I want you to pray in the spirit with me that we catch this man. This man is the boss, and there are two others behind him dressed in black. If you help me, I believe we can get the rat, the mole that's leaking. He's good at his job and very clever in how he does this, but the Lord wants this man caught. He is the head of the snake. If we can do this, we'll get rid of one bad man out of this equation and it will be like a domino concerning other major activities in our country because he's the one that delegates. There are two more men behind the boss. He is dressed in solid black with a black zip-up hoodie. I can't go into more detail than that. The Lord says, "Be still." Pray for this man to be caught. Let's pray together for five minutes. We want him to be found so that he receives misinformation, the people catch on to the mole, and they're able to give him false information and catch him. Call confusion in the camp. Father, we thank you for confusion in the camp, just like in Bible times where they turned on themselves. When they heard Gideon's army blowing their horns, they sounded the alarm. Gideon was up there—I'm seeing a lot of detail right now I can't talk about. Help me, Holy Spirit, to never forget this. They're underground. He said, "Don't tip them off." The vision is very detailed. I can tell you where these guys are, though I don't know what city it is. Lord, I thank you. I am not afraid; I am bold as a lion, Lord, and I see it so clearly. It's awkward that it's live, but the Lord said to just pray into it. They'll never find him without a key card. Yes, they will. We call them exposed. We call this base exposed in the name of Jesus. I see who is helping. Father, I ask right now for every one of these politicians to be brought to justice. I ask for these judges and law enforcement to be exposed for who they really are. Oh, what a tangled web they weave. All hidden things be revealed in the name of Jesus. I see the Justice Department is right on their heels. The blonde lady—is her name Pam Bondi? We pray for her to have wisdom. Is she the Attorney General? We must protect this woman and pray for her safety. I see a bounty on her head underground. It's like the old-timey Westerns with a reward on a billboard. There's more than one face; they have a hit list for people in the cabinet. I see who's funding it, but I cannot say this outside. Pray for her safety. I pray the blood of Jesus around her and that the angels of the Lord are camped around her and her vehicle. I pray protection around this black SUV. The number on the billboard is 50,000, maybe 500,000; I see the number five and then faded zeros. Father, I plead the blood of Jesus over this woman. She's good at her job. Give her supernatural wisdom about the rats. She's uncovering things that are too close. She's about to uncover a network that is very bad. It looks like a spiral with layers, and she's going to expose them. It looks like one of those Debbie snack cakes with cream in the middle. We pray a hedge of protection around her. Thank you, Father, for your angels watching over her. The Lord said, "Brandon, I've got this." That is my assurance. It goes clear down to the southern border. She needs more information. It's not enough. She needs a little bit more to make it enough. That's the word I hear. It's not enough. I need a little bit more. She says, "I just need a little bit more," and it's sealed. This is serious. It will be nailed shut, nailed tight, shut close, done. No squirming. It's done. And it's involving this certain man. I see his face. Everyone knows who this man is. We just need a little bit more. Can I say his name? Oh my goodness. I'm seeing Braden. This man used to be in the Biden administration and he gave Trump a lot of trouble. I see him and he is guilty. Don't put his name in there. I don't want my live stream getting taken down. So, if they're trying to guess who he is, please leave it alone. The Lord said leave it alone. Don't get my live stream taken down on YouTube. You want to keep praying with me. So I just can't say some of this stuff. It's on that drive. You'll find it. Guide her, Lord. It's right there. Open her eyes that she sees it tonight in her sleep. Holy Spirit, show her through the back door of this computer software. I call her to see it through the back doors. He tried to erase it, he tried to hide it, but she'll get it through the back door. I see a back door for social media. Now, Father, I pray a hedge of blood around me, my wife, and my children. I put angels around us, Father. I thank you, Lord, that no weapon formed against us will prosper. I thank you, Lord, that non-transparent angels are watching over me, my wife, and my kids. I fear no evil, for you are with me. I thank you for uncovering this and bringing this man to justice. You bring these people, for they have weaved a deep web. This goes way back. I see the blood of Jesus. We laugh at what the devil had planned. We laugh at what you have said. We will not have it. We have the victory and we pray from the victory side. We receive everything that you have for us and every one of these rats will be exposed and brought to justice. We call Pam Bondi protected in Jesus' name. We call a hedge around and about her. I don't know if she's married or has kids, but I call a hedge around this woman in Jesus' name because I heard her name specifically. I saw her face and the Lord said, "You must protect her." This is so much bigger than what anybody could ever comprehend. It's actually shocking to me. We thank you for President Trump today. We pray over his family, his wife, his marriage, his health, and all the witchcraft that's been assigned against him to try to take him down. We thank you, Lord, that the angels of the Lord are camped around him in the name of Jesus. We pray over President Trump that the angels of the Lord are protecting his heart, his arteries, his neck, his blood flow, and his feet. I thank you, Lord, that he will live long and finish strong and finish this job that he has to do. I pray over his marriage and his love life. I thank you, Father, that they have a refining and would come back together stronger than ever before. The main flow of what he wants to do is pray for Pam Bondi and over these people. And even, oh, listen to this: pray for Alex Jones. Pray for his safety. He's going to uncover some things. You say, "Oh no, he's deep state," but I see his heart changing. I see an awakening unto God. Alex Jones is going to have a major awakening unto God moment. There's something about to happen with this man. God's going to spare his life. In incidents like Charlie Kirk, God is going to spare his life. He's going to have an awakening unto God in the days ahead. Alex Jones will become very vocal, cleaning things up and becoming more awakened. I can only tell you what I see in the vision. You say, "Brandon, do all the visions you see come to pass?" Not all of them the way I see it; things are prayed away or moved. But you'll see it in the news. It's a prophetic lens. It's seeing beyond, knowing how to pray into something. I have never said I'm a prophet. I see in the future how to pray for things and I'm telling you what's coming. You must pray for Alex Jones. Same with Tucker Carlson, but it's weaker. There's something he's going to uncover that they try to silence. This time they will be about to succeed in silencing him forever, but the Lord will intervene. Pray for the economy. It's all by design—the government shutdown, the Federal Reserve. It will give us what we're looking for, a spark. Close in this month, more points in the housing market and the big building business market. Remember what he said? He's walking a pig with lipstick on it. He's parading the pig, holding interest rates, talking about the housing market, and there's a green arrow. He's walking a pig. The Lord wants to give you a window. New York is in trouble. A great shaking is coming to New York with the real estate market. I see many billionaires fleeing. They'll leave the city. They're going down to Miami, the big businessmen. They'll go to Texas. They're wanting to pack their stuff and leave. I see them fleeing like rats on a ship—people in really nice suits, big money leaving. I see West Palm Beach. A great change is coming. Wealth transfers, coming from this state to that state. Gavin's days are numbered. I'm not talking about death, I'm talking about removal. All I saw was him fading away concerning California. People are getting frustrated. The rich are very annoyed. It's almost like he fades into the background. He's trying to save face, trying to keep his influence because he wants to run for president. You understand? He wants to take the office of the United States of America in 2028. He wants his influence to grow. I'm telling you, with Booker—do you understand who I'm talking about? The African-American man—Gavin, I'm telling you, will try to get support, wanting their name in the hat like me. That's my time. This man is dark. Booker, it's almost like they're drunk on their own success. They're drunk on their own power. They don't even realize what people really think of them. There's a group of people like us; we don't like them, but they're drunk on their own success and their own pride, blinded by their own ignorance of who they are inside. But there's a face coming out of the dark. Who is that? It's a woman. There's a woman whose face is coming out of the dark. I can't make her out. I see a portal and a face is coming out of the dark. Who is that? This is for the Democratic party. They're trying to groom somebody. It's like they're walking with a major limp. Too much momentum within the Republican party. Glory to God. Wow. The Lord said, "Randy, you can end it there." We love you, Lord. We thank you, Father, for your voice. We give you praise and glory for telling us the great story, Father. What's coming? You are telling us your Son's return is coming soon. Glory to God. Remember, there'll be faces that you've never seen before rise up in the days ahead. Similar to how Barack Obama came out of nowhere, a shining light came up the center and he exploded into light. The reason why I saw his name is because immediately I saw him in a vision and the Lord said, "Remember how Barack Obama did it." His fame became overnight; so many people loved him. He was Chicago, right? Chicago, and it came out of nowhere. It's like a Senator, I believe this one will try to be anointed by the devil. Many Christians, you better take things more seriously. That's what he just said. You better take things more seriously. We will not lose this nation. It will not become a goat nation. We will remain a sheep nation. And we think because we have this window of opportunity with President Trump that you can let your guard down. We occupy until He comes. We must pray against these things. We have a window and the Lord has blessed us with this window. But do not squander it. Do not put your head back in the sand and go, "Well, it's okay. We're going home in the rapture." We occupy until He comes. No man knows the day or the hour. I have what I feel is a pull within three and a half years. But what if not? If we just go, "Well, we let go of the rope. We lose the nation again." No. The devil has a plan, but God has a bigger plan. We must pray out the plan. Do not give up and go, "Well, it's not my problem anymore. We have Trump; he needs our help." And Pam Bondi needs our help. Do you understand? That's why we have this channel. We must pray for their protection and for them to have wisdom on how to nail this thing closed. These people are like slippery little snakes. They're lizard-worms. They're able to get out of things real easy. But you want their case to be firm and to be nailed tight so that whenever it goes to this, they won't be able to say they got away. It has to be nailed tight. It's not enough yet. As the Lord says, "It's not enough yet." You must continue to pray for her, but she needs protection. This is very serious. All on this list, this hit list. It's an underground chatter. There's a list of people, and there's a bounty on their heads on each one. Some are priced higher than others. There's somebody big funding this. Each one and even Supreme Court Justices, do you understand what I'm telling you? There's a list, it's underground chatter, and there's a bounty, and we must protect them by the blood of Jesus. I don't know how these people communicate. I believe I have a glimpse of it, but they're looking for somebody who has courage in their eyes. They want to bring instability in the nation to bring in radical jihad. And we have the greatest leaders that we've had in decades over our beautiful nation. We must pray for them. They're under attack. We must pray for them that they're protected by the blood of Jesus. Do you understand? It is your problem. God has given you authority to pray over your area, and you pray over our law enforcement, our FBI, our Homeland Security, and our Secret Service. You intercede for them. It's your job. Especially because as America goes, so does the world. It's so important. You cannot just go, "Well, it's your problem, Brandon." No, it's all of ours. We're the body of Christ. We're a team. Not one of us is more special than the other. But I'm telling you, for what I just saw that I can't even talk about, you must pray for these people. This is very serious. It's not just about Donald's family. I saw something more tonight, and we must pray for them. Pray over Giuliani. Pray protection each day. Mike Huckabee, pray over Mike Huckabee. You understand? Pray for his safety. Radical people with deep pockets. If they would pass laws to regulate crypto, not trying to put their finger in the pie, but these bozos are using this. All that underground money, all that money transferring around. It's under the surface. I see a tentacle here. This one has sex trafficking on it. This has fentanyl on it. This is human trafficking. Even body part trafficking like organs. Pizzagate. My God. These people are going to be so judged. I don't even know how you could forgive this. They are sick. I've seen enough tonight. I'm tired. Sick man. What is wrong with people? They're so messed up. God just showed me something very heavy. Their day of judgment is coming. You touch the children; I'm telling you, your day is coming. They think they get away with it now, but it would have been better for them never to be born at all. It makes me angry. It's through witchcraft. There is a lot of darkness associated with it. Jesus is coming. That's all that I keep focused on. The world's going to get darker, but the church is going to get lighter. I can't look at it. A little glimpse of that was enough for me. I don't want to look at that ever again, Lord. I plead the blood. There are so many different directions I can pray now. That's why there's so many of us. It's not all on me. I tell you and you all can pray about it. I have my plate full. I just felt really impressed to pray for Alex. Alex Jones. I can't keep crying because it makes my nose run. The cold front blew through tonight and blew some different allergies in on me; it's made my nose run and my voice sound like that. But I feel good. It's just a first freeze. I need it to freeze, and whenever it freezes, things will die. Glory to God. It's heavy. I'm done; I'm tired. That was a lot. And so, y'all have a lot to pray over. It's not all on me; I bring it to you. But I'm going to tell you, if you don't pray for Pam Bondi, you don't pray for Alex Jones, you don't pray for these people. There's a lot there that I'll never be able to talk about publicly, but I saw a lot tonight. I told you the surface. And I'm telling you, by the power of God, we can stop these people. We can uncover and take the head of the snake. I believe Jesus gets the victory. We get the victory. We have the victory that overcomes the world, even our faith. Jesus is Lord over America. Jesus is Lord over the southern border. Jesus is Lord over MS-13. Jesus is Lord over the FBI. Jesus is Lord over corrupt government officials, over our judges, and over the corrupt people in this country. All hidden things will be revealed by the power of the blood of Jesus. I believe with all my heart God didn't show me this stuff just to show it to me, but to tell you we have authority, and if we take our authority, we will have a victory. Do you understand? He didn't tell it to me to sit there and go, 'Well, Brandon, this is what's happening; there's nothing you can do about it.' God does not speak to hear himself talk. He speaks to make real things happen in a real world. Remember that.]
